task_id: 慢模型复核灰度接入低置信视觉页
summary: 已按 review 返修 slow review 灰度接入：1) near-threshold 判定收紧为闭开区间 [threshold, threshold+review_band)；2) 对 explicit hard-fail 的 page/region（例如页级 veto、region bbox_iou fail）不再触发 slow review，而是逐页落盘为 decision_reason=hard_fail_page_or_region；3) 补齐 3 条回归测试，覆盖 lower-bound 判定、hard-fail page 跳过、hard-fail region 集成跳过。default_sync 仍保持完全禁用，quality/hybrid_async 下仅低置信且非 hard-fail 页面才允许灰度触发 qwen3_vl_8b。
tests: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=/Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/my-agent-teams/.runtime/worktrees/chiralium/task-2d70ea1e/backend /Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/chiralium/backend/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider /Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/my-agent-teams/.runtime/worktrees/chiralium/task-2d70ea1e/backend/tests/test_pdf_to_word_visual_similarity_slow_review.py /Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/my-agent-teams/.runtime/worktrees/chiralium/task-2d70ea1e/backend/tests/test_pdf_to_word_visual_similarity_gate.py -q -o cache_dir=/private/tmp/chiralium-pytest-cache-visual-slow-review --basetemp=/private/tmp/chiralium-pytest-temp-visual-slow-review -> 16 passed, 4 existing FastAPI deprecation warnings
cost_latency_observations: 成本观测点不变：slow_model_policy.max_review_pages、slow_model_review.selected_page_count、executed_page_count、fallback_page_count 仍可直接用于统计灰度页数预算、实际执行量和回退比例。
时延观测点进一步收敛：hard-fail page/region 现在在 slow review 之前被短路为 hard_fail_page_or_region，不再把必失败样本送入慢模型，从而避免无效灰度调用。
risks: 本轮只收敛判定窗口与 hard-fail 短路；slow_model_review.response 仍依赖后续实际 reviewer worker 的线上接线与真实耗时采样。
当前 patch 基于 worktree 内新增文件生成，待集成分支正式纳入版本控制后，review 侧仍需确认这些新文件与主仓目录映射一致。
